data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the delivery state lifecycle requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the delivery state lifecycle, but the evidence provided does not include any delivery rows or their corresponding states. The linked use case emphasizes the need for tracking delivery states, yet there is no concrete evidence of such states being created or checked. Therefore, the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of delivery rows per (event, subscription, channel) to validate the requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
